hero_subtitle: Buy, sell and auction the country's rarest plates. Every transaction runs through Mazal escrow custody — plate first, payment second.
feature_1_desc: Plate transfers to Mazal before you pay. Funds release only after ownership.
feature_2_desc: Auto-extend timers, proxy bids, KYC-gated rooms. No sniping, no theatre.
feature_3_desc: Get a Mazal cash offer in minutes. Paid in 24-48 hours.
feature_4_desc: Identities stay hidden until terms are agreed. No bypassing the platform.
escrow_subtitle: Mazal holds custody of the plate before the buyer transfers a fil. Ownership only moves after full payment is confirmed — and funds only release after ownership clears.
escrow_step_1_title: Seller transfers plate to Mazal custody
escrow_step_1_desc: Ownership held by Mazal, listing flagged 'in custody'.
escrow_step_2_title: Buyer pays full amount into escrow
escrow_step_2_desc: Bank transfer, card or scheduled cash pickup.
escrow_step_3_desc: RTA handover orchestrated through the app.
cta_title: Have a plate worth more than your car?
cta_subtitle: Submit it for a Mazal spot cash offer or list it for the open market. We'll handle the rest.
v2_feature_onspot_desc: An exclusive new service is coming soon. Stay Tuned!
v2_watching_subtitle: Explore our handpicked collection of premium number plates attracting the most attention.
